## Meeting Purpose

[Explore collaboration opportunities between GrowthX and Webflow in AI-driven growth and content marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/sa6YAHgrNBwNzJVRb8xY354w5srxe1Nz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both companies target similar enterprise/mid-market audiences with complementary offerings in AI-powered growth and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/sa6YAHgrNBwNzJVRb8xY354w5srxe1Nz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential collaboration areas: workshop/webinar, podcast appearances, co-hosted dinner event, and future conference involvement](https://fathom.video/share/sa6YAHgrNBwNzJVRb8xY354w5srxe1Nz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Shared interest in educating marketers on AI applications, particularly in content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/sa6YAHgrNBwNzJVRb8xY354w5srxe1Nz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Agreement on the resurgence of brand-building, storytelling, and traditional marketing roles in the AI era](https://fathom.video/share/sa6YAHgrNBwNzJVRb8xY354w5srxe1Nz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds and Synergies

  - [GrowthX: AI-powered growth agency, average contract \~$200K ACV](https://fathom.video/share/sa6YAHgrNBwNzJVRb8xY354w5srxe1Nz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Webflow: Website builder with AI-driven optimization (Webflow Optimize, from Intellimize acquisition)](https://fathom.video/share/sa6YAHgrNBwNzJVRb8xY354w5srxe1Nz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Complementary offerings: GrowthX's high-touch services align with Webflow's enterprise customers](https://fathom.video/share/sa6YAHgrNBwNzJVRb8xY354w5srxe1Nz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Shared target audience: Mid-market to enterprise companies (200-500+ employees)](https://fathom.video/share/sa6YAHgrNBwNzJVRb8xY354w5srxe1Nz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### AI in Marketing and Growth

  - [GrowthX focus: Educating marketers on practical AI applications through workshops, events, and content](https://fathom.video/share/sa6YAHgrNBwNzJVRb8xY354w5srxe1Nz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
